concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: G-formula and g-computation for intervention effects
concept_decisions.labels_compared: parametric_g_formula vs marginal_structural_models vs targeted_learning_tmle vs causal_mediation_analysis vs covariate_adjusted_historical_control_borrowing vs trial_transportability_and_hybrid_studies
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv plus provisional batch table in CONCEPT-BATCH-002.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: Most records estimate counterfactual intervention effects by g-formula or g-computation, but a small set instead centers marginal structural modeling, TMLE, mediation estimands, historical-control borrowing, or trial transportability.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv plus provisional batch table in CONCEPT-BATCH-002.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: Nearly all records use cutoff-based identification; one methods-feasibility paper only lists regression discontinuity as an optional supplementary design.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv plus provisional batch table in CONCEPT-BATCH-002.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: The retained cluster is the Abadie-style counterfactual-construction design; two records use the phrase synthetic control for laboratory control material or matched external control cohorts instead.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv plus provisional batch table in CONCEPT-BATCH-002.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: The records consistently define causal questions by explicitly emulating protocol elements of a target trial, even when applied to different interventions or data sources.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Targeted learning and targeted maximum-likelihood estimation
concept_decisions.labels_compared: targeted_learning_tmle plus TMLE-focused spill-in from parametric_g_formula
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv plus provisional batch table in CONCEPT-BATCH-002.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: The concept remains coherent around targeted learning and TMLE estimators, including TMLE for dynamic regimes in SMART analyses.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv plus provisional batch table in CONCEPT-BATCH-002.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: Across surveillance completeness, hidden-population size, and disease-burden estimation, the shared design is capture-recapture inference under source overlap assumptions.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: diagnostic_accuracy_calibration vs latent_class_diagnostic_models vs surveillance_measurement_validation vs diagnostic_test_accuracy_evaluation vs passive_surveillance_signal_detection
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv plus provisional batch table in CONCEPT-BATCH-002.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: The retained core adjusts case counts or burden estimates for underdetection, screening, misclassification, or imperfect testing; other assigned papers instead validate measurements, evaluate test accuracy, use latent-class identification without a gold standard, or perform passive-surveillance signal prediction.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: latent_class_models vs latent_class_diagnostic_models vs latent_class_trajectory_models vs latent_class_preference_models
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv plus provisional batch table in CONCEPT-BATCH-002.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: The dominant retained set uses latent classes to recover cross-sectional unobserved subgroups or phenotypes; diagnostic latent-variable measurement models, trajectory models, and preference-segmentation models require different estimands and assumptions and are split out.

reassignments.rationale: Marginal structural model selection is a distinct longitudinal causal-modeling design from g-formula plug-in estimation.
The estimand is a controlled direct effect through partner-selection mediators, so this is mediation analysis rather than generic g-formula intervention estimation.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Trial transportability and hybrid trial-observational studies
reassignments.rationale: This paper generalizes trial effects across settings, so the core design is transportability/generalizability rather than a standalone g-formula intervention analysis.
The paper decomposes total and direct effects through mediators, making mediation the operative design concept.
The stated contribution is g-computation for causal mediation with ordered mediators.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Targeted learning and targeted maximum-likelihood estimation
reassignments.rationale: The paper centers TMLE for embedded dynamic regimes in SMARTs, with g-computation only as a comparator.
The target estimands are pathway-specific effects for reservoir, zooprophylactic, and environmental mechanisms.
The paper develops multiply robust natural indirect effect estimation with multiple ordered mediators.
The core method is Bayesian historical-control borrowing with causal covariate adjustment, not g-formula estimation itself.
The design decomposes income effects into direct and variant-mediated components.
The analysis uses four-way decomposition with interventional analogues of natural effects.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Trial transportability and hybrid trial-observational studies
reassignments.rationale: The paper is about extending trial results to target populations in hybrid trial-observational designs.
The core estimand is a mediated effect of greenhouse gases within a mixture-exposure causal mediation analysis.
This is a design-feasibility paper comparing possible vaccine-effectiveness designs; regression discontinuity is only one optional supplement.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Synthetic control-material contamination in molecular diagnostics
reassignments.rationale: The article concerns contamination from synthetic control material in PCR workflows, not the synthetic-control causal estimator.
This study constructs a matched external synthetic control cohort rather than an Abadie-style synthetic-control time-series design.
The paper estimates test sensitivity and specificity without a gold standard using a latent-class measurement model.
The study validates surveillance reporting against chart review and estimates sensitivity, specificity, and predictive values of the surveillance system.
The paper critiques patient-infected-status algorithms by contrasting them with latent-class identification of test performance.
The core design validates self-reported vaccination against electronic records.
The paper validates laboratory proxies against encounter-based retention measurement.
This is a conventional reference-standard diagnostic accuracy systematic review/meta-analysis.
The design validates parental recall as a coverage measurement instrument.
The study validates routine respiratory-virus surveillance against a prospective quality-management ascertainment process.
The paper validates maternal recall against record-based vaccination data.
The design is a Bayesian latent-class network analysis for diagnostic accuracy without a perfect reference test.
This is a reference-standard diagnostic accuracy review and Bayesian meta-analysis.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Passive-surveillance signal detection and risk prediction
reassignments.rationale: The study builds a signal-detection and risk-prediction model on passive vaccine-safety reports rather than calibrating measurement error.
The design validates maternal recall as a vaccination-coverage measure.
This is a diagnostic accuracy systematic review/meta-analysis against PCR reference testing.
The paper validates self-reported smoking against cotinine biomarkers.
This review compares operating characteristics of diagnostic tests used in low-resource settings.
The study validates survey-reported adult vaccination status against registry/EHR sources.

new_concepts.rationale: Needed for longitudinal causal models identified through inverse-probability weighting and structural modeling rather than g-formula plug-in estimation.
Needed for records whose target estimands are direct, indirect, controlled direct, or pathway-specific effects.
Needed for Bayesian borrowing designs that combine historical controls with causal covariate adjustment.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Trial transportability and hybrid trial-observational studies
new_concepts.rationale: Needed for studies extending trial effects to target populations or combining randomized and observational data for external validity.
Needed for papers comparing feasible post-authorization vaccine-effectiveness designs rather than implementing one identification strategy.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Synthetic control-material contamination in molecular diagnostics
new_concepts.rationale: Needed for laboratory-method records about contamination from synthetic positive-control material.
Needed for matched external-control-arm constructions that are conceptually distinct from synthetic-control time-series methods.
Needed for records validating surveillance systems, recall measures, or proxy measurements against stronger reference data.
Needed for conventional diagnostic accuracy reviews and studies anchored to explicit reference standards.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Passive-surveillance signal detection and risk prediction
new_concepts.rationale: Needed for predictive modeling of adverse-event signals from passive surveillance reports.
Needed for latent-variable models that estimate true disease status or test performance without a perfect gold standard.
Needed for latent-class growth, trajectory, and repeated-measures pattern models.
Needed for latent-class segmentation of stated preferences in discrete-choice and modality-preference studies.

concerns: ordered_key_sha256 was computed as the SHA256 of newline-joined candidate_key values in assignment-file order because the manifest does not provide an explicit coverage digest definition.

Latent-class diagnostic vs subgrouping boundaries were resolved conservatively from titles and complete available abstracts; only records with clear diagnostic-measurement estimands were reassigned out of the retained subgrouping concept.
